name: ITF 16
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: ZIMRA's annual employee earnings, deductions, credits and PAYE return; applies to schools as employers.

name: Levy
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A charge billed alongside tuition for a defined purpose (development, sport, exams); configured per fee structure.

name: Term billing
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Billing cycle aligned to the three-term school year rather than calendar months.

name: Bursary / scholarship
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A discount or third-party-funded reduction applied to a learner's fees.

name: Family account
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: One receivable account covering all learners of one payer.

name: ECD
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Early childhood development; pre-primary learning levels.

name: Boarder / day scholar
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Learners charged boarding fees versus day attendance only.

name: Examinations centre
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A school registered to host national examinations; registration is a declared research gap.
